title: I am ready to hold property and land
subtitle: A release-and-allow method for removing the internal block on owning significant assets.
excerpt: A short energy statement practice from Day 25 of the MONEY program. Use when property or land feels like it belongs to a more organised, more established version of you rather than the one you are now.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 25 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). The release-and-allow structure draws on The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).

practice.whenToUse: Use when the idea of owning property, land, or significant assets triggers a sense of being unqualified or not yet ready.

content.text: A three-minute energy statement practice from Day 25 of the MONEY program. The statement works with readiness: not whether you have the deposit yet, but whether you have removed the internal veto on the possibility. Say it as a plain declarative.
I am ready to release the belief that property and land are not mine to hold. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.
I am ready to align with and allow the knowing that I am ready to hold property and land. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.
Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.
Adapted from Day 25 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). The release-and-allow framework draws on The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).
